top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'NJ') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'NJ') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'VT') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'VT') AS percentage_difference

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN z.short_state = 'NJ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)) -
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN z.short_state = 'VT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)) AS difference_percentage
FROM member m
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE z.short_state IN ('NJ', 'VT');

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'NJ') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'NJ') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'VT') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'VT') AS percentage_difference

WITH nj_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 AS percentage_nj
    FROM member m
    JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
    WHERE z.short_state = 'NJ'
),
vt_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 AS percentage_vt
    FROM member m
    JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
    WHERE z.short_state = 'VT'
),
total_members AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM member
),
nj_percentage AS (
    SELECT (SELECT percentage_nj FROM nj_count) / (SELECT total FROM total_members) AS pct_nj
),
vt_percent...

    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN z.short_state = 'NJ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)) -
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN z.short_state = 'VT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)) AS difference_percentage
FROM member m

     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'NJ') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'NJ') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m2 JOIN zip_code z2 ON m2.zip = z2.zip_code WHERE z2.short_state = 'VT') 
     FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code 
     WHERE z.short_state = 'VT') AS percentage_difference
